Cell.Data: POST /tasks then GET /tasks returns created task
Script-like title payload is handled safely
Very long title payload does not crash API
CORS header is returned for GET /tasks
POST /tasks baseline p95 latency under 250ms for 50 requests
GET /tasks median latency under 150ms for 200 requests
User can add a task and see it in backend list
User can mark task complete and then undo
POST /tasks then GET /tasks returns created task
POST /tasks then GET /tasks returns created task
Script-like title payload is handled safely
Very long title payload does not crash API
CORS header is returned for GET /tasks
POST /tasks baseline p95 latency under 250ms for 50 requests
GET /tasks median latency under 150ms for 200 requests
User can add a task and see it in backend list
User can mark task complete and then undo

Suite: Unit - Payload Validation PASS validateTaskPayload accepts valid title PASS validateTaskPayload rejects missing title PASS validateTaskPayload rejects whitespace-only title Summary: 3 passed, 0 failed

Suite: Integration - API Routes PASS POST /tasks then GET /tasks returns created task PASS PATCH /tasks/:id/complete toggles task PASS PATCH /tasks/:id/complete returns 404 for missing ID Summary: 3 passed, 0 failed
Suite: Smoke - Service Health PASS GET /tasks returns 200 and array PASS POST /tasks with valid title returns 201 PASS PATCH /tasks/:id/complete works for saved task Summary: 3 passed, 0 failed

Suite: API Contract - Endpoint Behavior PASS GET /tasks returns JSON array PASS POST /tasks requires title PASS POST /tasks returns required schema fields PASS PATCH /tasks/:id/complete returns 404 for unknown ID Summary: 4 passed, 0 failed

Suite: Security - Fuzz and Headers PASS Script-like title payload is handled safely PASS Very long title payload does not crash API PASS CORS header is returned for GET /tasks Summary: 3 passed, 0 failed
Suite: Performance - Baseline Throughput PASS POST /tasks baseline p95 latency under 250ms for 50 requests PASS GET /tasks median latency under 150ms for 200 requests Summary: 2 passed, 0 failed
Suite: Acceptance - Business Flow PASS User can add a task and see it in backend list PASS User can mark task complete and then undo Summary: 2 passed, 0 failed
